issues.detail: The skill does not address file-not-found or invalid format errors, limiting robustness.
The skill relies on Python and specific libraries, restricting use to agents that support Python execution.

scenarios.name: analyze-sales-data
scenarios.rationale: Response A includes more of the required outputs (e.g., saving the monthly trend chart) than Response B, but both miss several key items such as the category bar chart, correlation heatmap, missing value report, and describe statistics.

scenarios.name: compare-year-over-year
scenarios.rationale: Response B covers most rubric items, while Response A misses key requirements.
